StepAction: Idle: runloop iteration entry; no active anchor write in progress; AI has full session messages in prompt
Compaction predicate evaluates; if narrative kind selected (rebind / overflow without server-side path), SessionCompaction.run enters buildUserPayload
buildUserPayload appends TOOL_INDEX_INSTRUCTION to prompt: directs LLM to emit ## TOOL_INDEX fenced table listing (tool_call_id, name, args_brief, status, output_chars) for every pre-anchor tool call
LLM generates anchor body with prose narrative + TOOL_INDEX section; defaultWriteAnchor persists summary-true assistant message; post-write validator scans for ## TOOL_INDEX marker
Emit compaction.tool_index.emitted telemetry: {sessionID, anchorId, entryCount parsed from index, indexBytes}
Emit compaction.tool_index.missing telemetry; anchor still persists with degraded affordance; downstream L3 note must instruct guessing tool_call_ids from narrative
Next runloop turn: applyStreamAnchorRebind runs; most-recent anchor inspected; if kind=narrative, A3 fires injection
Prompt assembly prepends system_block_amnesia_notice with policy session_stable_until_next_anchor; content explains compaction state + TOOL_INDEX authority + recall instruction
No amnesia notice needed; standard prompt assembly proceeds
Model sees notice + TOOL_INDEX in anchor; decides whether to call recall; emits tool_call recall(tool_call_id) OR proceeds without recall
RecallTool.execute receives tool_call_id; calls Memory.Hybrid.recallByCallId(sessionID, callID); validates arg shape via zod schema
recallByCallId walks Session.messages stream; scans each msg.parts for ToolPart with matching callID; returns first match or null
Compaction proceeds via non-narrative path (server-side kind=4 or hybrid_llm); no TOOL_INDEX emission needed because provider preserves chain
Standard runloop continuation; model's next action processed normally; recall remains available for future turns
RecallTool returns output text + metadata {resolvedCallID, originalToolName, redundant}; emit tool.recall.invoked telemetry {found=true}
RecallTool returns typed error {error: unknown_call_id, message: <id> not found, advice: re-execute original tool}; emit tool.recall.invoked telemetry {found=false}
